USE THIS SKILL when the user asks to "make this repo ai-ready", "set up AI config", or "prepare this repo for AI contributions".

skills.name: process-optimization
skills.description: Analyze and improve business processes. Trigger with "this process is slow", "how can we improve", "streamline this workflow", "too many steps", "bottleneck", or when the user describes an inefficient process they want to fix.

skills.name: retro
skills.description: Analyze sprint retrospectives for patterns and action item tracking. Usage: /retro analyze <retro_data.json>

skills.name: competitive-matrix
skills.description: Build competitive analysis matrices with scoring and gap analysis. Usage: /competitive-matrix <analyze> [options]

skills.name: postgresql-dba.agent
skills.description: Work with PostgreSQL databases using the PostgreSQL extension.

skills.name: create-github-issues-feature-from-implementation-plan
skills.description: Create GitHub Issues from implementation plan phases using feature_request.yml or chore_request.yml templates.

skills.name: create-github-issue-feature-from-specification
